expected_outcome: Competent Cloud Engineer with skills in designing scalable cloud architectures, managing serverless architectures, deploying container applications, and managing cloud security rules.

topics.name: Object Storage & Databases
subtopics: AWS S3 / Azure Blob Storage basics

phases.practice_schedule: 2 Hours daily setting up EC2 instances, mounting storage, and uploading data to S3 via CLI tools.

mini_project.title: Cloud Host Portfolio Site
mini_project.description: Host a static web portfolio on a secure bucket (S3) with SSL and route traffic through a custom domain mapping, and launch an EC2 instance to serve an API backend.

phases.milestone: Mastered basic compute provisioning, virtual disks, permission profiles, and cloud object hosting.

topics.name: Virtual Networking (VPC)
subtopics: Route Tables & Network Access Control Lists (NACLs)

phases.practice_schedule: 2 Hours daily configuring subnets, network routes, setting up load balancers, and testing scale-out triggers.

mini_project.title: High-Availability Web Server Stack
mini_project.description: Configure a secure VPC, deploy dual web servers in private subnets, place an Application Load Balancer in public subnets, and configure auto-scaling based on CPU load.

phases.milestone: Proficient in cloud network designs, access configurations, and scaling systems dynamically.

topics.name: Container Services in Cloud
subtopics: AWS ECS & Fargate for serverless containers

phases.practice_schedule: 2.5 Hours daily writing serverless handler functions and pushing Docker containers to cloud services.

mini_project.title: Serverless Emailing Microservice
mini_project.description: Create an API endpoint via API Gateway that triggers an AWS Lambda function, processes input details, and sends an email via Amazon SES.

phases.milestone: Capable of deploying applications without managing servers using functions-as-a-service and serverless container runners.

phases.phase_title: Phase 4: Cloud Monitoring, Security & Cost Control
phases.practice_schedule: 2 Hours daily writing infrastructure scripts and configuring dashboard charts and alarms.

mini_project.title: Terraform Infrastructure Audit Suite
mini_project.description: Write a Terraform template to construct a secure environment (VPC, RDS instance, IAM role) and configure CloudWatch metrics alarms for disk usage.

phases.milestone: Equipped to enforce security policies, keep budgets optimized, and audit deployment events.

major_projects.title: Serverless Image Processing Platform
major_projects.description: An application where users upload raw images to a bucket, triggering a Serverless Function that auto-compresses them, generates thumbnails, saves metadata to DynamoDB, and sends a notification email via SNS.

major_projects.title: Multi-Tier Container App Migration with IaC
major_projects.description: Script the entire cloud infrastructure using Terraform to run a containerized Node/Express database application on AWS Fargate behind a Load Balancer, complete with RDS database persistence, SSL/TLS certificates, and CloudWatch metrics dashboard.
